headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 23, 2024**
article:
The Houston Astros secured a shutout victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Peter Lambert earning the win after pitching 6.0 innings with 8 strikeouts and 0 earned runs. Yordan Alvarez led the Astros' offense with a 3-hit, 2-RBI performance, including his 11th home run of the season.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, affecting their teams' lineups. The San Diego Padres transferred RHP Bryan Hoeing from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to a torn right elbow flexor tendon. The Texas Rangers placed LF Wyatt Langford on the 10-day injured list with a right forearm strain. The Philadelphia Phillies transferred RHP Max Lazar from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to a left oblique strain and placed C J.T. Realmuto on the 10-day injured list with back spasms.

The Houston Astros made a trade, acquiring SS Braden Shewmake from the New York Yankees in exchange for RHP Wilmy Sanchez. The Los Angeles Dodgers traded RHP Chayce McDermott to the Baltimore Orioles for RHP Axel Perez. The New York Mets traded LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash. The Arizona Diamondbacks traded RHP Junior Fernández to the Milwaukee Brewers. The Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers for future considerations and international bonus pool money.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Fall to Marlins in 4-1 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals suffered a 4-1 loss to the Miami Marlins, with Iván Herrera leading the Cardinals' offense with a home run and one RBI. Michael Petersen impressed in relief for the Marlins, striking out three batters in a scoreless inning.

top_news.title: **Astros Shut Out Guardians 2-0**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros secured a shutout victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Peter Lambert earning the win after pitching 6.0 innings with 8 strikeouts and 0 earned runs. Yordan Alvarez led the Astros' offense with a 3-hit, 2-RBI performance, including his 11th home run of the season.

top_news.title: **Reds Fall to Rays in Dominant Performance**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays defeated the Cincinnati Reds 6-1, with Nick Martinez earning the win after throwing 8.0 innings with 6 strikeouts and 1 earned run. Junior Caminero led the Reds' offense with 1 home run and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Royals in Thrilling 8-6 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured an 8-6 win over the Kansas City Royals, with Coby Mayo leading the offense with a home run and three RBIs. Anthony Nunez earned the save in relief, following a strong outing from Chris Bassitt.

top_news.title: **Padres RHP Bryan Hoeing Shifts to 60-Day IL**
top_news.summary: San Diego Padres right-hander Bryan Hoeing has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to a torn right elbow flexor tendon. The move is a result of a status change in his injury.

top_news.title: **Astros Acquire Shewmake in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros have traded RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees in exchange for SS Braden Shewmake. Shewmake joins the Astros after being acquired in the trade.
